# Vogue AI

> Vogue AI is a multilingual AI prompt gallery and image generator for creators who want reusable visual prompts, reference-image workflows, and a practical generation workspace.

Updated: 2026-06-29

## Core Pages

- [Home / Prompt Gallery](https://vogueai.net/): Browse free AI image prompts, visual references, model filters, and prompt cards.
- [Generator Workspace](https://vogueai.net/app): Generate images from prompts and reference images with supported image models. Public product surface, not submitted in the sitemap.
- [Blog](https://vogueai.net/blog): Vogue AI prompt workflow guides and product notes.

## Multilingual Pages

The actively sitemap-submitted localized public surfaces are the homepage, blog index, and blog posts. Supported locale paths are `en`, `zh`, `fr`, `ru`, `pt`, `ja`, and `ko`; English is served without a required prefix.

## Prompt SEO Pages

- [AI Image Prompt](https://vogueai.net/ai-image-prompt)
- [GPT Image Prompt](https://vogueai.net/gpt-image-prompt)
- [Nano Banana Prompt](https://vogueai.net/nano-banana-prompt)
- [Midjourney Prompt](https://vogueai.net/midjourney-prompt)

## Prompt Detail Indexing

Prompt detail URLs are single-language English canonical pages. Vogue AI submits 213 curated prompt-detail pages in `sitemap.xml`; non-selected prompt detail pages stay accessible for users but are marked `noindex, follow`.

Legal pages are also English-only:

- [Privacy Policy](https://vogueai.net/privacy-policy)
- [Terms of Service](https://vogueai.net/terms-of-service)

## Product Model

Vogue AI uses Better Auth for login, Stripe and ZPAY for payment, Postgres with Drizzle ORM for data, Cloudflare R2 for assets, a shared credit ledger, and a unified image generation API.

Pricing is opened as an in-app dialog. The `/pricing` route redirects to the homepage pricing dialog and is not submitted as an SEO page.
